cleavage agent: trypsin digestion with a maximum of 2 missed cleavages
fragmentation method: data-dependent MS/MS spectra of the most intense parent ions
ionization type: Peptides were suspended in Buffer A (0.1% formic acid)
reduction reagent: supplemented with DTT and bromophenol blue
reduction concentration: supplemented with DTT to a final concentration of 0.2 mM
